leagueBriefing: The Thunder and Spurs continued their dominance at the top of the Western Conference, while the Knicks and Hornets secured massive blowout victories to tighten the playoff seeding races in the East.

games.headline: Ball's triple-double sparks Hornets' fourth-quarter explosion against Heat
games.brief: LaMelo Ball put on a clinic in Charlotte, leading the Hornets to a dominant win over the Heat by outscoring Miami 40-18 in the final frame. The Hornets' ball movement was simply too much for a Miami defense that looked uncharacteristically sluggish late in the game.
bullets: LaMelo Ball stuffed the stat sheet with 30 points, 13 assists, and 6 rebounds.
Charlotte's 40-point fourth quarter was their highest-scoring period of the season.
Tyler Herro led the way for Miami with 20 points, but received little help in the second half.
The Hornets shot a blistering 54% from beyond the arc as a team.
games.context: The win moves Charlotte within one game of Miami for the 7th seed in the Eastern Conference.

highlights.title: HEAT at HORNETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: SGA drops 40 as Thunder survive late Magic rally in Orlando
games.brief: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander continues his MVP-caliber season, dropping 40 points to help Oklahoma City fend off a resilient Magic squad. Orlando clawed back from a double-digit deficit in the fourth, but SGA’s poise at the free-throw line iced the game for the West’s top seed.
bullets: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander recorded his 10th game of the season with at least 40 points.
Paolo Banchero led Orlando with a double-double, tallying 32 points and 10 boards.
The Thunder forced 18 Magic turnovers, resulting in 24 points off giveaways.
OKC has now won five straight games on the road.
games.context: Oklahoma City maintains their slim lead over the Spurs for the best record in the NBA.

highlights.title: THUNDER at MAGIC | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Duren's career night lifts Pistons over struggling Wizards
games.brief: Jalen Duren dominated the paint in DC, scoring a career-high 36 points to lead the high-flying Pistons past the Wizards. Washington kept it close in the first half, but Detroit’s size and transition game proved overwhelming after the break.
bullets: Jalen Duren finished with 36 points and 12 rebounds on 15-of-18 shooting.
Wizards rookie Bub Carrington paced Washington with 30 points in the loss.
Detroit outscored Washington 64-42 in the paint.
This marks Washington's 8th consecutive loss.
games.context: Detroit inches closer to securing a top-4 seed and home-court advantage in the first round.

highlights.title: PISTONS at WIZARDS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Hart's heroics lead Knicks in blowout win over Pacers at the Garden
games.brief: The Madison Square Garden crowd was electric as Josh Hart led a balanced Knicks attack that dismantled the Pacers. Indiana struggled to find their rhythm offensively, while the Knicks seemingly couldn't miss, turning a close game into a rout by the third quarter.
bullets: Josh Hart scored a season-high 33 points while grabbing 7 rebounds.
New York finished the game with 35 assists on 50 made field goals.
Obi Toppin led Indiana with 15 points against his former team.
The Knicks shot 58% from the field, their best mark of the season.
games.context: New York solidifies their hold on the 3rd seed in the Eastern Conference standings.

highlights.title: PACERS at KNICKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Mobley anchors Cavs' gritty road victory against Giannis-less Bucks
games.brief: Evan Mobley put together a defensive masterclass and a double-double to help Cleveland overcome the Bucks in Milwaukee. Despite a late surge led by Kevin Porter Jr., the Cavaliers' interior defense held firm in the closing minutes to secure a vital road win.
bullets: Evan Mobley tallied 27 points, 15 rebounds, and 3 blocks.
Kevin Porter Jr. led the Bucks with 25 points and 10 assists in Giannis Antetokounmpo's absence.
Cleveland out-rebounded Milwaukee 52-38.
The Cavaliers scored 18 second-chance points off 14 offensive rebounds.
games.context: Cleveland remains in a tight race with the Knicks for the second seed in the East.

highlights.title: CAVALIERS at BUCKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Randle powers Timberwolves past Suns to maintain home dominance
games.brief: Julius Randle was the catalyst for Minnesota, scoring 32 points to lead the Timberwolves over the Suns. Phoenix relied heavily on Devin Booker, but a cold shooting night from the rest of the Suns' roster allowed Minnesota to pull away in the second half.
bullets: Julius Randle recorded 32 points, 7 rebounds, and 3 steals.
Devin Booker scored 34 points but was the only Suns player to cross the 20-point threshold.
Minnesota’s bench outscored the Phoenix reserves 42-19.
The Timberwolves have now won 23 games at home this season.
games.context: Minnesota stays within striking distance of a top-4 seed in the Western Conference.

highlights.title: SUNS at TIMBERWOLVES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Nuggets crush 76ers as Philadelphia struggles without Embiid
games.brief: The Nuggets made quick work of a shorthanded 76ers team, leading by 20 at halftime and never looking back. Denver’s balanced attack and superior depth were on full display as they cruised to a victory that was over long before the final buzzer.
bullets: Christian Braun led a balanced Nuggets scoring effort with 22 points.
Denver shot 55% from the field while holding the 76ers to just 41%.
Trendon Watford was a bright spot for Philly with 12 points, 6 assists, and 3 blocks.
The Nuggets recorded 33 assists on 48 made baskets.
games.context: Denver moves into a tie for the 4th seed in the West with the Pelicans.

highlights.title: 76ERS at NUGGETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026

games.headline: Spurs dominate in Sacramento to secure 51st win of the season
games.brief: The Spurs showed why they are the class of the Western Conference, systematically dismantling the Kings in Sacramento. Victor Wembanyama didn't need to do much as the Spurs' perimeter players torched the Kings from deep, building a 30-point lead by the end of the third quarter.
bullets: Victor Wembanyama posted 18 points and 8 rebounds in limited minutes.
Maxime Raynaud scored a career-high 32 points for the Kings in the loss.
San Antonio made 22 three-pointers, one shy of their franchise record.
The Spurs scored 78 points in the first half alone.
games.context: The Spurs remain tied with OKC for the best record in the Western Conference.

highlights.title: SPURS at KINGS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 17, 2026
